## Improvements

Sidebar Polish — The right sidebar All files tree now has cleaner indentation, subtler folder styling, and a calmer row rhythm that makes browsing workspace files easier.

Terminal Dock Refinement — The terminal panel now uses a simpler dock header, compact terminal switching, and quieter controls so it feels integrated with the sidebar instead of like a separate widget.

Scratchpad Scroll Stability — Editing long scratchpad notes now preserves scroll position while the write surface resizes, preventing the page from jumping upward when typing near the bottom.
